Marinated Shrimp

author: Katie Blatt

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield: 4 persons

Ingredients

  • 3 cloves garlic
  • 1/3 cup oil
  • 1/2 cup tomato sauce (or ketchup)
  • 2 tbsp red wine vinegar
  • 2 tbsp fresh basil
  • 1/2 tsp salt
  • 1/4 tsp cayenne pepper
  • 2 lbs shrimp

Directions

Good marinade for shrimp on the grill or sauteed.
